title: Zmod
description: A mod based on SystemZee and Knarfy from youtube. just a funny little goof of a mod that is funny.
body:
[15% Off first month with CODE BLU3](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=330)
![CODE: BLU3 FOR 15% OF FIRST MONTH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/659a3341e0a19c24df63f6f029c5c820f1588c96_0.webp)

[My twitter](https://x.com/SolarisBlueYT)

[My personal twitch account](https://www.twitch.tv/SolarisBlu3)

# DO YOU LIKE SYSTEMZEE?
## DO YOU LIKE KNARFY?

If you awnsered yes to both then this is the mod for you!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# WHAT IS IN THIS MOD?

This mod adds:
- 2 new dimensions
- 2 new ores
- a new biome
- emerald tools
- New structures w/ unique loot
- and more things!

Anything else? well play it and find out yourself!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Plans:
-  Add SystemZee and knarfy mobs ✔️
-  Knarfy Wither
-  Zee Warden
-  E G G

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Items and what they do

- Orb of zee = lights a portal made of Zee blocks
- Banana Pudding = Lights a portal Made of Knarfy blocks
- Knarfy Gems = Makes Knarfy tools and armour
- Zee Ingots = Makes Zee tools and armour
- banana = Makes banana Pudding
- Hotel = trivago

![Portals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aeec32c701318a0110d63f5c3de5a649d390265_0.webp)
